dir.code: stt_rec, ma_dvcs, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, ma_lo

title.v: Cập nhập thông tin chênh lệch kiểm kê tự động
title.e: Update Auto Generation of Stock Variance Information

command.text:
declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512)
select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số liệu đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số liệu đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'edit the record. It has already been used.' end
if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and r_edit = 1) begin select '' as field, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end
if not exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and ma_vi_tri_x = @o_vi_tri and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo_x = @o_lot and type = @type) begin select '' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if @ma_vi_tri_x <> @o_vi_tri or @ma_lo_x <> @o_lot begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and ma_vi_tri_x = @ma_vi_tri_x and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo_x = @ma_lo_x and type = @type) begin select '' as field, @$updateConflict as message return end end
delete @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and ma_vi_tri_x = @o_vi_tri and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo_x = @o_lot and type = @type insert into @@table(stt_rec, ma_dvcs, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, ma_lo, ma_vi_tri_x, ma_lo_x, sl_cl, gia, gia_nt, tien, tien_nt, pn_gia_tb, px_gia_dd, type, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2) select @stt_rec, @ma_dvcs, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, @ma_vt, @ma_lo, @ma_vi_tri_x, @ma_lo_x, @sl_cl, @gia, @gia, @tien, @tien, @pn_gia_tb, @px_gia_dd, @type, getDate(), getDate(), @@userID, @@userID
select '' as field, '' as message, 'on$AutoGenerateStocktakingUpdate$QueryComplete(this, ''' + replace(replace(isnull(@ma_vi_tri_x, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''', ''' + replace(replace(isnull(@ma_lo_x, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''', ' + replace(replace(isnull(@pn_gia_tb, '0'), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ', ' + replace(replace(isnull(@px_gia_dd, '0'), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ', ' + replace(replace(isnull(@gia, '0'), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ', ' + replace(replace(isnull(@tien, '0'), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ');' as script return
